aboutData.title: Hi There! I'm Elijah Ajibade
aboutData.subtitle: Full Stack & Product Engineer Who Ships End to End
aboutData.text: Full stack and product engineer with 3+ years of production experience across web, mobile, and email surfaces. I currently lead product and engineering at gotdot.it, a Microsoft Outlook add-in for sales teams, owning everything from schema design through React UI to AWS deployment. Previously I built a real-time multiplayer trivia platform across three platforms at GameNite (React Native mobile, Next.js web, Node backend) and shipped the first MVP for Flowva (React TS, Tailwind, Supabase), which now serves 4,000+ users. I bring backend rigour, frontend craft, and a sharp product sense to whatever surface the work shows up on.

services.title: Problem Solving
services.text: I pride myself in my ability to break down problems to it's smallest possible bits, seeing connections and patterns via critical thinking and proferring adequate solutions

services.title: Frontend & Mobile
services.text: Building responsive web and cross-platform mobile apps with React, Next.js, and React Native (iOS/Android), styled with Tailwind and powered by Redux Toolkit and TypeScript.

services.title: Backend & Systems
services.text: Designing scalable services with Node.js/Express and Laravel, real-time systems on Socket.IO and SSE, and provider-agnostic abstractions for multi-source integration across SQL and NoSQL stores.

services.title: Database Design
services.text: Proficient in designing and implementing database solutions using MySQL and MongoDB, ensuring optimal data structure and performance.

services.title: API Development
services.text: Creating robust RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express, with TypeScript integration for enhanced code reliability and maintainability.

services.title: AI Feature Engineering
services.text: Shipping production LLM features on Azure OpenAI: thread classification, task and contact extraction, deal-health scoring, natural-language search, and SSE-streamed generation.

skillData.title: Technical Expertise and Professional Skills
skillData.text: I bring backend rigour, frontend craft, and a sharp product sense across web, mobile, and email surfaces. My strengths span TypeScript full-stack development, React/React Native, real-time systems, cloud infrastructure on AWS, and production LLM integration on Azure OpenAI.

skills.title: AWS (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, Cognito, RDS) & Terraform

portfolioItems.title: gotdot.it — Outlook Revenue Intelligence
portfolioItems.subTitle: An email-native Microsoft Outlook add-in for sales teams. I lead product and engineering end to end: a 28-method provider-agnostic CRM abstraction, a Prisma/PostgreSQL data layer, and four production AI feature phases on Azure OpenAI (thread analysis, task & contact extraction, SSE-streamed reply composition, and deal-health scoring with NL search). Live with Zoho CRM in production.

portfolioItems.title: GameNite — Real-Time Multiplayer Trivia
portfolioItems.subTitle: A real-time multiplayer trivia platform shipped across three surfaces: React Native apps for iOS and Android (25+ screens), a Next.js 15 web client, and a Node.js + Socket.IO backend for matchmaking, live scoring, and leaderboards. Backed by multi-environment AWS infrastructure (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, Cognito, RDS) provisioned with Terraform.

portfolioItems.title: Flowva — Productivity MVP (4,000+ users)
portfolioItems.subTitle: I owned the first MVP for a new product direction end to end, building it in three months on React TS, Tailwind, Supabase, and PostgreSQL. The product now serves 4,000+ users, helping businesses and freelancers save time and cost. I contributed product and UX direction alongside engineering.

portfolioItems.title: V-Concepts LTD Corporate Website
portfolioItems.subTitle: I designed a responsive and intuitive website (with an online bookshop integrated) for a publishing firm using WordPress.

informations.title: Making Sense of AI and Web 1,2,3
On Redemptive Tech and Emerging Civilizations
Mr. Lazarus Irakpo
informations.text: Elijah Ajibade is a very resilient, determined and diligent young man who has a burning passion for tech. He has been very consistent, learning and acquiring up-to-date skills. He has created a lot of amazing websites for clients, including the one for my company. I will gladly recommend him to anyone who desires to have an official website or build applications.

informations.title: Mrs. Sarah Osarumwense
informations.text: I found the training very impactful. Thanks for breaking down seemingly big concepts to very small understandable bits.

informations.title: Mr. Ernest H. Abinokhauno
informations.text: 'Thank you very much for the good work, you too much!' were some of my words to Elijah during our web development process. Elijah knows his onions, I highly recommend!

experience.title: Product & Full Stack Software Engineer
experience.subTitle: gotdot.it (Full-time, Remote)
experience.text: Leading end-to-end product and engineering for an email-native revenue-intelligence Outlook add-in. Shipped a production add-in integrated with Microsoft Graph and MSAL (live with Zoho CRM), a 28-method provider-agnostic CRM abstraction, a Prisma/PostgreSQL data layer, and four AI feature phases on Azure OpenAI. Replaced a 645-line keyword classifier with an LLM-driven thread-analysis service and closed a cross-user AI cache leak via per-user scoping.

experience.title: Web & Mobile Developer
experience.subTitle: GameNite App (Full-time, Remote, USA)
experience.text: Built a real-time multiplayer trivia platform across three platforms: React Native apps for iOS and Android (25+ screens), a Next.js 15 web client, and a Node.js + Socket.IO backend for gameplay sync, matchmaking, live scoring, and leaderboards. Shipped 20+ REST endpoints and stood up multi-environment AWS infrastructure (Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, Cognito, RDS) via Terraform.

experience.title: Software Engineering Fellow
experience.subTitle: Brave Redemptive Fellowship (Residential, Ogbomoso, Nigeria)
experience.text: One of 24 fellows selected from hundreds of applicants for a fully funded ($5,000) year-long residential programme. As a frontend engineer on Preview AI, an LLM-powered hiring tool, I built reusable React/TypeScript components and integrated LLM APIs. I also led an analytics sub-team that produced growth strategy recommendations for marketing campaigns.

experience.title: Product & Full Stack Software Engineer
experience.subTitle: Flowva (Contract, Remote, Canada)
experience.text: Owned the first MVP for a new product direction end to end, building it in three months on React TS, Tailwind, Supabase, and PostgreSQL. The product now serves 4,000+ users. Contributed product and UX direction alongside engineering, focused on time and cost savings for businesses and freelancers.

experience.title: Back End Developer
experience.subTitle: ActsSocial (Contract, Remote, USA)
experience.text: Designed and shipped 30+ Laravel REST API endpoints with full models, migrations, controllers, and resources for engagement and analytics features. Stack: PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and Eloquent ORM, with unit, feature, and integration testing.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.subTitle: Better Place LTD, Lagos (Full-time, On-site)
experience.text: Designed and shipped websites and landing pages delivering up to 800% ROI. Set up information systems and networking infrastructure that lifted operational efficiency by ~15%.

education.title: B.Tech, Mathematical Sciences (Computer Science)
education.subTitle: Olusegun Agagu University of Science and Technology (OAUSTECH)
education.text: Second Class Honours, Upper Division. Key modules: Artificial Intelligence, Computer Architecture, Computer Logic, and Computer Networking. Served as Director of Hardware & Software for the NACOS OAUSTECH chapter (Certificate of Leadership).

education.title: Microsoft Applied Skills & Professional Certificates
education.subTitle: Microsoft
education.text: Applied Skills: Accelerate App Development by Using GitHub Copilot, and Professional Certificate: Introduction to Generative AI. Also completed Postman API Fundamentals (2025).

education.title: SHE Hacks Africa Coding & Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
education.subTitle: WAAW Foundation
education.text: Deep dive into version control, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Apache/MySQL, PHP, Node.js, and the Ionic framework. My team built an Electronic Medical Records (EMR) website as our capstone, emerging as first runners-up.

contactData.text: I'm looking to connect with like-minds from all works of life and races. Let's talk about solving problems of all sizes that affect humanity!
